title: Foundation and repo hardening
goal: Turn the seed scaffold into a deterministic package with clear source registry and better CLI ergonomics.

title: Ingestion for priority sources
goal: Implement public-data fetchers for primary dealer stats, Treasury auctions, upcoming auctions, investor class, SOMA, and H.8.

title: Panel builder and harmonization
goal: Build standardized source tables and an auction-week panel with documented joins and schemas.

title: Bridge metrics and first analyses
goal: Generate event-study style figures, summary tables, and modest baseline regressions.

title: Public repo polish
goal: Finish docs, examples, CI, and release readiness for a public GitHub repo.
